subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents regarding the Azalis became known. The root cause of all these matters is the discord among the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از تفصیل یحیاایها اطلاع حاصل گردید سبب جمیع اینها اختلاف احباست
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @constitutional revolution in Iran
